title: Interactive Elements Test: 'GET STARTED' Button Functionality
test_steps: Step 1: Navigate to the main screen., Step 2: Tap the 'GET STARTED' button.
expected_result: Step 3: User should navigate to the search page after tapping the 'GET STARTED' button.

title: Social Media Icon Interaction Test: Opening Social Profiles
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the Facebook icon., Step 2: Verify that the Facebook app or facebook.com opens., Step 3: Repeat step 1 for LinkedIn and Google Plus icons., Step 4: Verify that the respective platforms open.
expected_result: Step 5: Upon clicking Facebook, verify that the correct URL loads., Step 6: Upon clicking LinkedIn, verify that the correct URL loads., Step 7: Upon clicking Google Plus, verify that the correct URL loads.

title: Map Interaction Test: Location Pin Click
test_steps: Step 1: Zoom into the map view., Step 2: Tap the red pin marking a specific location., Step 3: Verify that details about the location are displayed.
expected_result: Step 4: The location details should accurately reflect information associated with the red pin., Step 5: There should be no unexpected behavior when interacting with the map pin.

title: Profile Card Display Test: Correct Information Presentation
test_steps: Step 1: Ensure the profile card shows the photo labeled 'Jennifer'., Step 2: Check that the title 'Top Model' is displayed under the photo.
expected_result: Step 3: The profile card should contain accurate personal information matching the provided test data., Step 4: All text elements within the profile card should be readable and properly formatted.

title: Font Size Accessibility Test: Readability
test_steps: Step 1: Verify that the heading font size is approximately 24sp., Step 2: Verify that the body text font size is around 16sp., Step 3: Verify that the caption font size is close to 12sp.
expected_result: Step 4: Text elements should maintain readability across different devices and resolutions., Step 5: Users with visual impairments should be able to comfortably read all text elements.

title: Input Validation for Age
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '-1' into the Age field., Step 2: Attempt to calculate the waist to height ratio.
expected_result: Step 3: Error message displaying an invalid age entry.

title: Input Validation for Height
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '-100' into the Height field., Step 2: Attempt to calculate the waist to height ratio.
expected_result: Step 3: Error message displaying an invalid height entry.

title: List Category Selection Test
test_steps: Step 1: Locate the 'Normal Weight' category within the list., Step 2: Tap the 'Normal Weight' category.
expected_result: Step 3: Confirm selection changes view to normal weight range information.

title: Font Size Contrast Compliance
test_steps: Step 1: Review all text elements for compliance with WCAG AA standards regarding color contrast., Step 2: Check that font size meets minimum requirements for readability.
expected_result: Step 3: All text elements meet the required contrast ratio of ≥4.5:1., Step 4: Text elements have appropriate font sizes ensuring readability.

title: Touch Target Size Compliance
test_steps: Step 1: Measure touch target areas for interactive elements like buttons and tabs., Step 2: Verify that each touch target is at least 44x44 pixels.
expected_result: Step 3: Confirm that all touch targets exceed the minimum size requirement., Step 4: No user errors due to insufficient touch target size.

title: Interact with 'TOP LEADERS' List
test_steps: Step 1: Tap on the 'TOP LEADERS' card., Step 2: Verify that John Doe's profile appears with 1500 XP.
expected_result: John Doe should be listed under 'TOP LEADERS' with correct XP and rank., Profile details including name, XP, and rank should match the test data.

title: Engage with 'You Are Next' Section
test_steps: Step 1: Scroll down to the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section., Step 2: Tap on the entry for Jane Smith.
expected_result: Jane Smith's information should be displayed correctly in the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section., Scroll behavior should allow easy access to the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section.

title: Test CTA Button Functionality
test_steps: Step 1: Locate the CTA button within the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section., Step 2: Tap the CTA button.
expected_result: The system should navigate to the appropriate page after tapping the CTA button., Navigation flow post-CTA tap should be consistent with expected outcomes.

title: Verify Contrast Ratio Compliance
test_steps: Step 1: Check the contrast ratio between the text and its background in both the 'TOP LEADERS' and '... YOU ARE NEXT' sections., Step 2: Confirm compliance with WCAG AA standards (≥4.5:1)
expected_result: Contrast ratios should meet or exceed the WCAG AA standard., Text visibility issues due to poor contrast should be absent.

title: Check Text Size in '... YOU ARE NEXT' Section
test_steps: Step 1: Measure the font size used for the user names and XP in the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section., Step 2: Ensure the font size is at least 12sp to meet accessibility guidelines.
expected_result: Font size for all text in the '... YOU ARE NEXT' section should be at least 12sp., Any deviation from the required font size should trigger an alert during testing.
